Bold numbers indicate best results for each model. CLIP CLIP-L ALIGN BLIPC BLIP-LC BLIPF BLIP-LF acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR With penalty Baseline 63.28 76.27 62.85 76.24 68.90 80.00 60.90 74.33 64.58 77.51 60.47 73.87 69.76 80.42 Galactica 6.7B exact 49.66 66.59 56.24 71.44 52.48 68.45 43.41 60.82 50.32 66.95 41.90 59.68 54.00 70.23 what_is 60.13 74.40 62.78 76.11 62.63 75.50 57.88 72.62 61.12 74.59 53.56 68.73 64.79 76.81 describe 59.61 74.04 60.48 75.13 62.20 75.80 55.51 70.74 56.59 71.25 52.92 68.13 58.96 73.49 meaning_of 60.09 74.69 60.32 74.80 62.20 75.04 61.56 74.57 61.34 74.99 52.27 68.02 61.99 75.49 would_say. 57.78 73.32 59.75 74.52 56.16 71.45 55.29 70.42 55.72 70.92 51.19 66.89 60.26 74.05 could_desc. 62.45 75.98 63.97 76.62 58.10 72.89 55.51 70.00 56.59 71.38 49.24 66.15 60.48 74.29 write_desc. 58.54 73.10 60.75 74.93 57.88 72.64 55.72 70.27 56.16 70.83 49.24 64.97 60.91 74.25 Without penalty Baseline 59.18 72.94 60.69 74.42 65.66 77.48 57.24 72.07 61.34 75.88 57.67 71.96 65.01 77.86 Galactica 6.7B exact 45.35 63.57 53.97 69.58 49.89 66.30 38.66 57.14 47.08 64.40 38.01 56.83 50.76 67.94 what_is 56.61 71.74 59.91 73.82 60.91 74.12 55.72 70.32 58.75 72.82 52.27 67.77 61.77 74.84 describe 56.80 71.54 58.53 73.31 59.61 73.85 53.56 69.03 80.28 67.91 50.97 66.30 54.43 70.60
